title: Change of His Majesty’s Ambassador to Senegal: Carine Robarts
body: "Mrs Carine Robarts has been appointed His Majesty’s Ambassador to the Republic of Senegal and His Majesty’s non-resident Ambassador to the Republic of Guinea-Bissau, in succession to Ms Juliette John, who will be transferring to another Diplomatic Service appointment.   Mrs Robarts will take up her appointment during August 2025.  Curriculum vitae  Full name: Carine Elisabeth Robarts     Year Role      2020 to present FCDO, Sahel Development Director and Deputy Head, Sahel, Sudan and South Sudan Department     2017 to 2020 Accra, Deputy Development Director, Department for International Development (DFID)     2014 to 2017 DFID, Head Central Asia and Senior Governance Adviser covering Afghanistan, Pakistan and Central Asia, Western Asia Department     2010 to 2013 Kinshasa, Team Leader and Senior Governance Adviser, DFID     2003 to 2009 PricewaterhouseCoopers, Senior Consultant, UK and overseas (Jordan, Armenia, Democratic Republic of Congo)     2001 to 2003 Tegucigalpa, Sector Specialist, InterAmerican Development Bank (IADB)     2000 to 2001 DFID, Governance Adviser     1999 to 2000 Cabinet Office, Economist        Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
